q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: The sink is exec(base64.decodestring(bytes(first_name, 'ascii'))), which is arbitrary code execution (RCE).

mock_guidance.target: Mock the built-in exec function to intercept the call on line 72.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact string argument passed to exec after it is evaluated by base64.decodestring(bytes(first_name, 'ascii')).
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Prevent actual execution of the decoded payload. Return None or safely pass to allow the function to continue to the render call.
notes: The base64 decoding will still occur before exec is called; ensure the test input is valid base64 to avoid TypeError during argument evaluation.
Verify that the mock captures the decoded string to assert the code injection payload reached the sink.
